summary: Editable D2 JSON draft for human review.
general_information: The DANIEL K INOUYE is a container ship built by Philly Shipyard, Inc. for Matson Navigation, Co. It has a length of 260.3m and a gross tonnage of 48,409gt. The vessel features dual-fuel engines and is designed to accommodate various cargo sizes, including 45-foot containers and refrigerated cargo. It also has a ballast water treatment system and is classified by DNV GL with several notations.

warnings: DNV source index refreshed from Excel with 7277 entries.
The local AI did not return usable JSON, so the app created a structured editable draft from parser data.

standard.name: DNV_GMOD_INTERNAL_DEFAULT
standard.description: Default maritime taxonomy used by the application for vessel data extraction, validation and classification.
standard.rule: AI must classify extracted data using this taxonomy first. Missing categories must be proposed as extensions, not invented as final nodes.
